alt: Small platypus in shallow river water
caption: Baby platypuses are called puggles and hatch from eggs before nursing from their mother.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated young platypus image with verified species identification. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/2/2f/Ornithorhynchus_anatinus%2C_January_2015.jpg
